video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Barcelona host Newcastle at the Spotify Camp Nou for the decisive second leg, with the tie finely balanced at 1–1 after Harvey Barnes’ late strike was answered by Lamine Yamal’s stoppage‑time penalty in the first meeting. Who will come out on top? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
video_info.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service. His initial prejudice fades as his players show him a new perspective on life.
